jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at FarmERP
jsonLd.description:
FarmERP invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FarmERP:
FarmERP is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FarmERP!
